name: Pin Asset
description: Snapshot any resolvable value into your own /a/ content-addressed store. Idempotent — pinning the same value twice produces the same hash. If the source is already a CAS asset, both metadata and content are preserved; otherwise the resolved value is stored as inline metadata. Returns {path, hash} where path is your DID URL for the pinned asset and hash is the bare hex CAD3 ID. Use this to freeze a venue op or workspace value at a specific version.

path.description: Source address. Any resolvable form: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).
Caller's DID URL for the pinned asset (did:.../a/<hash>)

hash.description: Hex CAD3 hash of the pinned metadata — version identifier
